name: Peppy Panini
recipeIngredient: 6 Tbsp Light garden vegetable cream cheese, divided
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Slice the focaccia in half horizontally.
3. Spread each half with 3 Tbsp cream cheese.
4. Layer one half with tomato, bell pepper, pepperoni, and cheese.
5. Cover with the remaining bread half.
6. Wrap tightly in foil.
7. Bake for 20 to 25 minutes or until hot.
8. Cut into wedges.
